calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville
Spanish translator, Christina Llop, present with petitioner.
Petitioner Mirian Del Carmen Lopez present for minor in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Karmeny Myryan Lopez Garcia.

Decree signed in open court.
